field_guide.net_signal_rating: 1–10 composite: thesis_align(30%) + capital_impact(25%) + prob_follow(25%) + priority_norm(20%) ± risk/reaction adjustments
field_guide.capital_impact_score: 1–10: revenue/contract significance, dollar amounts, public company relevance
field_guide.probability_of_follow_through: 1–10: likelihood signal results in real market action
field_guide.thesis_alignment_score: 1–10: fit with Investing with SPACE core thesis layers
field_guide.execution_risk: low | medium | high — risk of acting on this signal

meta.scoring_note: Priority score = alert_score + confidence + tracked_company_status + revenue_event + core_layer_hits + feed_repetition + dollar_amount + freshness - false_positive_risk - staleness

priority_signals.headline: Rocket Lab To Acquire Motiv Space Systems
priority_signals.summary: Rocket Lab will acquire space robotics company Motiv Space Systems. The acquisition, announced Thursday evening in conjunction with Rocket Lab’s Q1 earnings, will achieve two goals: Motiv is expected to be rebranded as Rocket Lab Robotics when the acquisition closes, which is scheduled for Q2.
